reviews.title: I would not recommend this place until the senior management solves the pet friendly matters
reviews.text: We naively booked the villa for 2 nights after seeing a review from a KOL posting videos staying at Radisson Phan Thiet, with her 2 dogs sitting on 2 beds in the villa. We have 2 poodles (<4kg each) as well, so we booked without reading carefully the policy that one villa only allows 1 dog <6kg. Of course, it was our mistake, and we did not find out until last minutes when we were already traveling to the resort. I called the reception on the way to explain the situation, got transferred to the booking department and got the response from the reception that if the booking department confirms we can stay in the villa with two dogs, then it’s possible. The booking department then firstly said that the policy doesn’t allow, and at the end she said she would check with other deparments whether they can allow my 2 dogs. No response since until we arrived the place, and the reception again restated we were not allowed to check in with our 2 dogs according to the policy. The location manager (who claimed to be the highest level in charge there) said that the policy was clearly stated in the booking platform, and if the policy did not meet our requirements, we could have chosen a different place - which was obvious because why would we waste our time and money just to be in this frustrating situation?!?!?! A solution they gave us was to book another villa (2 villas = 2 dogs allowed). We did not think it makes sense, given we are a couple of 2, with 2 dogs. When we asked if its allowed in case we book another villa and leave it empty while our 2 dogs still stay with us, they said it’s up to us since they cannot control. What’s the point of the policy or proposing this option then? Probably proposing converting our 2 nights in 1 villa to 1 night in 2 villas (for the sake of fulfilling the policy) would make us less disappointed, but the reception just didn’t do anything else telling us to book an extra villa. So we respected their policy and walked out of the place without checking in, giving away our 2 nights due to nonrefundable booking.  Aware the staff had to follow whatever the policy is, but I would not recommend Radisson Phan Thiet until (1) they promote and advertise correctly their pet friendly policy, and (2) there is an escalation policy for customers to speak to a higher management level in special cases, to someone that really listens to customers’ needs and comes up with reasonable solutions.
reviews.response:
Dear Mai,

Thank you for taking the valuable time to share your comment regarding your recent reservation with us and bringing this concern to our attention.
We are very sorry for the service that did not meet your expectations. The pets and guests’ safety and comfort are our utmost priority. As discussed, you were aware of the policy on the booking channel and informed by our team members about the same message on reservation platform before arriving.
Please allow me to clarify, our current pet policy includes the following:
• Pets are allowed only in villa accommodations.
• Each villa may host only one pet.
• Pets must weigh under 6kg.
• A cleaning fee of 560,000 VND per pet per stay applies.
• Pets are welcome to sit in designated outdoor areas of our restaurants only.

For safety and comfort, pets must be kept on a leash at all times while in public areas of the resort.
These policies are in place to ensure a safe, relaxing, and enjoyable environment for all our guests.
Once again

reviews.title: Radisson Resort
reviews.text: My stay at the Radisson Resort in Phan Thiet was far from satisfactory considering the high cost. The room was underwhelming and didn’t match the price tag. The location was also inconvenient, making transportation quite a hassle. Although the staff were friendly and enthusiastic, their efforts didn’t compensate for the shortcomings in the facilities and location. Additionally, I felt uncomfortable being asked to give a 5-star review on Google, despite not feeling entirely positive about the stay. Overall, the experience was disappointing and not worth the expense.

reviews.title: Disappointing Stay at this Resort
reviews.text:
I recently stayed at Radisson in Phan Thiet and had a very disappointing experience. I booked a private bungalow, but the design of the walkway passing by the room completely lacked privacy. During my two-day stay, I was constantly disturbed by noise, which ruined any sense of relaxation.  

Every morning at 7:30 AM, the sound of lawn mowers outside my room woke me up, and the noise continued in the afternoon as well. The gardening staff sat near my room, talking loudly, which made it impossible to enjoy any peace.  

When I arrived at 4:00 PM, loud music from the beach was blaring into my room. I later found out that the resort had rented out the beach to a group for a team-building event. This completely destroyed any sense of tranquility or privacy. My child and I tried to enjoy the beach, but the unbearable noise from the live band made it impossible. It felt like the resort only cared about the group guests and ignored the comfort of other guests. While the beach is a shared space, the resort should have managed the noise levels to ensure everyone could enjoy it.  

Overall, my stay was far from the relaxing resort experience I expected. The lack of professionalism in management and organization was evident. I will not return to this resort and cannot recommend it to friends or family.

reviews.title: Excellent place to Stay & Play at the nearby PGA golf course. Courteous pro staff eager to please !!
reviews.positives: At first I had reservations about this hotel when I was booking in and the lobby was full of out of control young children and their families. I cancelled my 4 day stay and rebooked for 2 consecutive 2 day blocks back to back. In this way I thought if the place proved too busy after one night I can cancel and move on. Somehow this new math saved me over 1,000, 000 VPN . I always thought 2 + 2 = 4 . Anyway, to my surprise the resort quieted down and over the next 5 days I had a peaceful and very relaxing stay. The hotel is quite new and as a result quite clean. The staff under the leadership and grace of Nguyen Thi Kien were courteous, professional and very eager to please. I chose this hotel because of the proximity to the PGA golf course hoping for a Stay & Play package. None existed at the time but the golf course did give me a discount when I mentioned I was staying at the Radisson. The resort offered me free shuttle service to and from the course which was a definite bonus. After several rounds at the PGA course the hotel staff helped arrange a tee off time for me at the Sea Links golf course about 45 minutes way for some variety. The Sea Links course is a harder layout but was not in better shape than the PGA course. Both courses were a delight to play. I would definitely recommend the Radisson to any golfer hoping to get away and play 18 a day with plenty of time left to lounge around the resort or explore the nearest town.....The only negative is that they could not help me improve my game :))
reviews.negatives: The location was a little far from the Phan Tiet

reviews.title: Misled booking information
reviews.text:
I booked the room via Agoda, where it was clearly stated that the room I selected had a balcony. However, upon arrival, I found that the room only had windows and no balcony.

When I contacted the front desk, they blamed Agoda entirely and only offered to upgrade me to a room with a balcony for an additional fee. While it’s not fair to put all the blame on the resort since the booking was made via Agoda, it’s also unreasonable for the resort to deny any responsibility.

At the end of the day, it’s not as though Agoda created the listing without Radisson's consent. A business should ultimately be responsible for its product, regardless of where it’s sold. If Agoda made a mistake on their page, Radisson should have alerted them to prevent customers from being misled.
reviews.response:
Dear Nhat Huy,
Xin chào !

Thank you for sharing your feedback about your experience at our hotel. We are sorry to hear that the room did not fully meet your expectations. The images on Agoda are intended to illustrate the various room types and amenities at the hotel. However, there may be some slight differences in room layout or view for individual rooms.

We appreciate your input and will review this to ensure that the images are accurate and provide clearer information. We hope you will give us another opportunity to serve you in the future and provide a better experience.

Warm regards,
Simply Delightful

reviews.title: worth experiencing
reviews.text:
Being a 4-star resort, I initially didn't have high expectations, but when I arrived, I was quite surprised by Radisson Phan Thiết. 
Advantages:
- The campus area is quite beautiful; I think it's a suitable location for couples who want to relax and take wedding photos, which is quite nice.
- The staff is very friendly and remembers customers well. Maybe it's because the resort has few rooms, so this is a significant plus for the resort.
- A common feature of Radisson resorts is that the villa rooms are arranged quite reasonably, making it easy to move around the area without needing a buggy.
- The resort only has one restaurant, and the dishes are quite well-prepared, although the number of dishes isn't many. There is a BBQ buffet in the evenings, and the price is reasonable.
- I was quite hesitant when booking with the resort since I saw a few comments mentioning that the restaurant played music loudly, but during my visit, there wasn't any, so I can't comment on that.
- We had cakes delivered to our room in the evenings. I was a bit surprised by this. I appreciate it. I wonder if this is just for villas or if all room types receive it.

Limitations:
- Mini Bar. I think a 4-star international standard resort should have a larger refrigerator. I was a bit disappointed that they only provided a small mini bar in the room, which should be improved.
- The restrooms sometimes have black ants due to being near the garden. Although it doesn't affect much, it's something that should be improved for a better experience.
reviews.response:
Xin Chao Phan,

Thank you for taking the time to share your valuable comment regarding your stay at Radisson Phan Thiet. 
It's a pleasure to receive positive feedback that would encourage our associates strive to continuously enhance the quality of our services.
We look forward to welcoming you back in the nearest future.

Sincerely,
Simply Delightful

reviews.title: Clean and quiet resort
reviews.text: I chose this place because it allows dogs. However, there is an additional charge of about 20 USD per day for dog accommodation, which needs to be paid on-site. During the inquiry about this, the male staff at the reception was very unfriendly and curt, which left a bad impression. They provided a small dog mat, food bowl, and water bowl. The dog mat was too small, so it was slightly small even for our 5kg dog. I stayed in a beachfront pool villa, and the facilities and cleanliness were good. I stayed for three days, and the breakfast menu was fairly unchanged and just average. It was nice to have a private beach, and there were good umbrellas and beds in front of the beach. The gym was accessible 24 hours with a room key, which was also good. There aren’t many places to go nearby. There is a clean, large restaurant worth walking to, but I can't remember its name. It feels like you need to solve most meals within the resort. They provide a golf cart for the golf course, but you need to reserve it in advance. It's a resort in Phan Thiet, which is quite far from the Mui Ne backpacker street.

The highest priority in the hotel's operating standards at Radisson Resort Phan Thiet is always guest pleasure. We will be much inspired by your feedback to continuously enhance our offerings in order to provide the greatest services.
We only allow pets in villa accommodations, and they cost VND 560,000 per night.
We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the near future to demonstrate that we have improved and can provide better service.

reviews.title: Resort đẹp xinh phù hợp nghỉ dưỡng, nhưng biển khó tắm được
reviews.text:
Điểm cộng:
- Resort nhỏ xinh xinh, phù hợp cho gđình nhỏ.
- Nhân viên thân thiện, hiếu khách, có hỗ trợ checkin sớm nếu có phòng.
- Hồ bơi sạch sẽ, nước ấm, phù hợp cho cả người lớn và trẻ em.
- Xung quanh nhiều quán ăn ngon.

Điểm cần cải thiện:
- Vị trí biển dơ nên ko ai ra tắm được, về phía mạn Bikini beach thì sạch hơn, đông người tắm.
- Có block nhà không có thang máy, điều này phải được thông báo trước khi khách book, tránh trường hợp khách không thể tự lên thang bộ được (già yếu, khuyết tật,..).
reviews.response:

With any luck, we'll be able to greet you once more and give you an improved experience. Again, we want to thank you for the insightful comments. Our primary goal is making sure you're happy.

reviews.title: Schade um das Geld
reviews.positives:
Ein absoluter Traum ist tatsächlich das Fitnessstudio und die Massage draußen am Meer. 
Novadreams ist eine schöne Idee wie ein Mini Disneyland für Kinder nur leider alles sehr sehr ausgestorben 
Mitarbeiter sind sehr bemüht und sehr freundlich, Sauberkeit ist gewährleistet wenn man die verschmutzen Liegen und die schmutzige Dusche im Poolbereich weglässt. Die Aussicht aus dem Zimmer wenn man nicht nach links aus dem Balkon guckt und nur das Meer und nicht die Baustellen sieht
reviews.negatives:
Ich weiß garnicht wo ich anfangen soll, zerrissene Polstermöbel auf der Terrasse und am Pool- sofern man überhaupt eine Liege bekommt denn ab 8:30 wird alles schon reserviert und Schirme gibt es auch nur 8, sodass man mit Kindern nur in der prallen Sonne oder am super dreckigen Strand liegen kann der nur auf der rechten Seite vom Hotel sauber gehalten wird da die Nachbar Grundstück vollkommen verdreckt sind und auch das Meer an mehr Tagen Quallen und Muellueberflutet ist als ein Badeparadies. Handtücher waren oft morgens schon alle weg und die man bekommen hat meistens fleckig und vergilbt. Unser Spiegel war kaputt die Matratzen falsch also quer im Bett und alles in allem war außer die Halbpension /das Essen und das bemühte Personal einfach kein wohlfühlen Feeling dort eine Geisterstadt umgeben von Baustelle Müll und alles kaputt. 
Achtung noch ein Hinweis Kidscorner ist ein Witz, einoffener Bungalow mit super dreckigen alten Matten und paar Spielsachen wo die Kinder nur mit  Aufsicht der Eltern spielen  können.  Unser Highlight der Tümpel /Teich die die ganze Gartenanlage umfasst ein stillgelegtes Paradies für alle Mücken und Frösche, dort einen Pool würde vielleicht alles ein wenig besser machen und der Rest sollte sich auch austauschen lassen bis auf den Müll aber das wäre vielleicht mal ein Anfang um den Bildern gerecht zu werden. Wir haben alles gemeldet und haben nicht mal 1 Nacht Kompensation bekommen hätten dann am Tag 7 für 3 Nächte noch in eine Villa gekonnt wahrscheinlich direkt neben dem schönen Teich haben wir dankend abgelehnt dann wenigstens die schöne Aussicht aufs Meer

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
First impresson was the no air-con lobby, supper hot ... while WC is cool. Why? 
We had a pleasant stay in our vacation at Radisson resort. The hospitality is nice, swimming pool staff is friendly to kids. If you wish to stay away from the crowded Mui Ne,  and enjoy a staycation, this is a good choice compared to nearby properties like private villa in Novaworld and Movenpick.  The private beach is better than Movenpick but not at my expectation due to floating rubbish, hope this is just seasonal and will be maintained well by the resort. Breakfast had a variety of local foods and fusion foods, ala carte dishes are good at surprised price.  Havent tried spa and cocktails, you can try if there's no night activities. Anyway, all good at this price range.
reviews.response:
Dear Pearly,

Warmest greetings from Radisson Resort Phan Thiet!
Thank you for sharing your positive review of our truly authentic hospitality following your recent stay with us. We are always delighted to learn from our guests. Your endorsement is not only a pleasure to receive but also further motivates our team member to continuously provide outstanding service.
Regarding the AC lobby, we will address to this matter for enhancing our guest experience. Thank you for recommending us to other travelers as well.
We do look forward to receiving you again in the nearest future.

Sincerely,
Simply Delightful

Kien Nguyen
Rooms Division Manager

Das Personal war super freundlich. 
Herausragend war jedoch das Frühstück. Super vielfältig.
reviews.negatives:
Wir hatten leider im Zimmer, im Bereich der Klimaanlage, Schimmel. Dies konnte man sofort nach betreten des Raumes deutlich riechen und war super unangenehm. Ohne geöffnetes Fenster, wäre dies nicht auszuhalten gewesen. 
Durch eine aufgestellte Öllampe wollte man den Geruch überdecken, dies scheiterte jedoch kläglich. 
Abgesehen davon war die Umgebung um das Resort recht gruselig. Viele Ruinen und verlassene oder nicht fertiggestellte Anlagen.

reviews.title: Preis-Leistung nicht passend
reviews.positives:
Das Hotel hieß uns mit einem tollen Willkommens Food Package willkommen. Gefühlt endete danach jedoch der Service. Die Minibar wurde nicht aufgestockt und wir mussten täglich neuen Wäschebeuteln hinterher telefonieren. Auch das Team schien nicht ganz gesund zu sein. So wurde man beim frühstücken mit permanentem Husten des Teams begleitet. 
Die Zimmer waren okay, wiesen aber sehr wenig Stauraum auf. Grundsätzlich fehlten Kleinigleiten, wie z.B. eine Wäscheleine und Co. Für mehr als 2-3 Tage Aufenthalt ist das Hotel also nicht ausgelegt.
Grundsätzlich ist die Anlage schön, allerdings sind die Strände voll mit Müll und toten Fischen. Hier erwarte ich von einer solch großen Hotelkette mehr Verantwortung.
Alles in allem sicherlich nicht schlecht, aber deutlich unter den Standards, die andere Hotels in besserer Lage und Ausstattung sowie mit besserem Service liefern.

reviews.title: Moderne Anlage, hilfsbereites Personal, gut zum Relaxen!
reviews.positives: Frühstücksbuffet ist einigermaßen gut ausgestattet, es steht vieles zur Auswahl. Die Lage ist ruhig, direkt am Strand, in einer schön kultivierten Anlage mit modernen Zimmern. Das Personal ist entgegenkommend und hilfsbereit (so wurde z.B. für uns eine Tour arrangiert, die standardmäßig von dort aus nicht buchbar war). Ansprechender Poolbereich mit eigenem Strandzugang. Fitnesscenter ist nicht üppig ausgestattet, aber das nötigste ist da und auch modern.
reviews.negatives: Die Lage ist ruhig und schön, allerdings gibt es kaum etwas drumherum - die nächsten Einkaufsmöglichekiten sind weiter entfernt. Die Zimmer verfügen nur über offene Ablagen, es sind keine Schränke und kaum Laden vorhanden. Das Personal ist freundlich und hilfsbereit, dessen English jedoch eindeutig verbesserungswürdig. Das führt zu Verwirrungen, wo dann oft mehrere MitarbeiterInnen hinzugezogen werden müssen (z.B. bei den Speisen, wenn man Halbpension bucht)

reviews.title: Wir haben uns mehr erhofft.
reviews.positives: Schöne, saubere Zimmer. Lage direkt am Strand. Großes, leckeres Frühstücksbuffet. Gepflegte Anlage.
reviews.negatives: Schmutziger Strand und mehrere Tage durch Firmenveranstaltungen blockiert. Preise für Essen und Getränke im Hotel für vietnamesische Verhältnisse sehr teuer. Leider gab es auch immer wieder technische Probleme (Warmwasser, Stromausfall, Klimaanlage, Zimmerkarte).

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
I love this hotel. It is not gaudy or flashy or too big. The pool by the beach is great, and dining room has excellent food- besides the breakfast buffet, we had a good dinner here.
The only drawback is the location. It in the southern part of Phan Thiet, maybe 15 minutes by car into town, where all the restaurants are. And it is an hour from Mui Ne. But is closer to Sai Gon, since this hotel is so far south.
reviews.response:

We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back to Radisson Resort Phan Thiet in the near future.

Sincerely,
Simply Delightful,


Tuan Mai
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Sehr schöne Anlage, Halbpension mit drei Menü System sollte nochmal überdacht werden
reviews.positives: Die Hotelanlage war sehr schön und das Personal sehr nett und zuvorkommend.
reviews.negatives:
Die Sitzkissen und Liegebezüge könnten öfter gereinigt werden, fast alle hatten ältere Flecken und sahen etwas mitgenommen aus. 
Wir hatten zudem Halbpension gebucht. Uns wurde mitgeteilt, dass wir drei Menüs zu wählen hätten. Jedoch war es schlussendlich so, dass es zwar drei Menüs mit jeweils fünf Hauptgerichten gab aus den man wählen konnte. Wir waren zu dritt und mussten uns allerdings zusammen für eins dieser Menüs entscheiden und haben dann alle fünf Gerichte des jeweiligen Menüs für drei Personen erhalten. Dies fanden wir etwas umständlich, denn eine von uns isst vegetarisch. Nachdem wir dies anmerkten wurde uns ebenfalls eine vegetarische Karte gegeben, wir zwei anderen Fleischesser mussten aber trotzdem noch ein Menü zusammen wählen und durften nicht einzeln entscheiden.

reviews.title: Sauber & tolle Betten
reviews.positives:
Tolles Bett, die Kissen waren ein Traum. 
Es gibt einen schönen Pool mit ausreichend Liegen (war allerdings auch wenig los), gutes Frühstück (lecker Ei, Salami, Käse, Schokobrötchen, …)
Das Gym war auch toll, mit Blick auf den Strand, gute Geräte, klimatisiert.
reviews.negatives:
Im Verhältnis zu draußen sehr teure Getränke und teures Essen.
Der Strand war okay, aber nichts besonders schönes. Nur der Abschnitt beim Hotel ist sauber, rechts und links dreckig. 
Wenig drum herum, aber man kann mit dem Taxi fahren.
Der Service ist zwar sehr freundlich, aber räumt nichts ab und macht am Pool auch keinen Service. 
Leider kein SmartTV.

Các bạn nhân viên thân thiện và nhiệt tình. Phòng rất sạch và tiện nghi. 
Vì ở khu Phan Thiết nên yên tĩnh và chill hơn so với Mũi Né. Bờ biển ở đây sạch và đẹp hơn các khu khác. Thích hợp cho bạn nào đi nghỉ dưỡng và chỉ ở trong resort.

reviews.title: Super Hotel mit tollem Service!!! - Strand geht so...
reviews.positives:
Das Personal war extrem freundlich und hilfsbereit. Als mein Freund krank war, haben sie uns einen Tee ins Zimmer gebracht und am nächsten Tag gefragt, wie es ihm geht. Trotzdem war das Personal nicht aufdringlich. Das Zimmer war sehr schön und vor allem dir sehr große Dusche hat und sehr gefallen. Vom Balkon aus hatten wir sogar Blick aufs Meer, obwohl das gar nicht angegeben war. Das Frühstück war sehr vielfältig und gut. Es gibt eine direkten Zugang zum Strand und einen schönen Pool. Insgesamt fanden wir die Hotelanlage sehr schön.
Insgesamt eine tolle Erfahrung. Wir können es empfehlen.
reviews.negatives:
Der Strand ist leider nicht sehr schön. Obwohl er gereinigt wird (man sieht wie schlimm es am benachbarten Teil des Strands aussieht), liegt noch viel Müll rum und auch im Meer kommt einem viel Müll entgegen. Wir verstehen nicht, warum in Vietnam so schlecht mit den Stränden umgegangen wird. Natürlich ist das nicht direkt das Problem des Hotels, allerdings sind wir ja auch für den Strand dorthin gekommen.

Ein kleiner Punkt noch: im Zimmer war die Steuerung des Lichts sehr ungünstig gelöst. Man kann leider nur Licht im bad anmachen, wenn man es auch im Wohnzimmer anmacht....

Staff were polite and friendly and nothing was too much trouble especially Tam who was very helpful. The pool area is just beautiful and when stepping into the water was like stepping into a warm and soothing huge bath. The room had a queen bed which was very comfortable and the pillows were delightful. If not full board you are able to purchase food bothe Western and Vietnamese. The hotel is quite isolated however taxis are so very cheap so there would be no problem going into Phan Thiet town. All in all we had a fabulous relaxing 3 days.

reviews.title: Almost Perfect. One of the best 4 star resorts
reviews.text:
Apart from a little hiccup with my booking pre arrival, my stay celebrating my wife’s bday has been magical. 
Radisson Management, you’ve done well here. Staff and service are on point. From reception, restaurant staff, security and lifeguards. All were fantastic. Thank you so very much!
Food here being a 4* there isn’t as much variety but it’s quality over quantity. The Vietnamese set dinner menu felt like I was eating a home cooked meal. Delicious.
Pool and facilities were clean and there were plenty of sunbeds and seating available for guests.
My only gripe is the beach. Being a public beach it was ưngroomed and messy. A lot of rocks, shells and trash. Also the fishermen riding their scooters back and forth along the beach fishing kind of ruined the serenity and vibe of the place which can’t be helped and not the hotels fault.
Hotel is also pet friendly, my dog loved the open space and beach. Staff were very accommodating to my pet.
Rooms were modern and clean. I’d recommend staying in the bungalow if your budget permits. 
All in all a fantastic stay. I will definitely be coming back here.
Thank you Radisson Phan Thiet

reviews.title: Geen 4 sterren waard en zeker geen vol pension boeken
reviews.positives: Het eten was lekker, de kamer ruim en het bed comfortabel.
reviews.negatives:
Wij boekten een komfort kamer met garden view en kregen een kamer met zicht op een gebouw. Schuin links en rechts was er beperkt zicht. De open badkamer vonden wij geen succes. Het ontwerp ziet er leuk uit maar is zeer onpraktisch en vooral onvoldoende verlichting. In de kamer zijn er verschillende sfeerverlichtingen, maar voor alles moet de master aanblijven...ook zijn er een beperkt aantal sateliet kanalen, geen bbc world.
Wij boekten 4 nachten vol pension. Maar elke lunch en elk dinner  kregen we de keuze uit DEZELFDE  3 menu’s! Na lang aandringen was er meestal wel een aanpassing mogelijkheid,  maar het feit dat men hierover zo rigide was en wij telkens op onze strepen moesten staan was zeer onaangenaam. Het personeel leek zeer bang om af te wijken van de opgelegde regels.Ook al waren onze vragen ver van onredelijk. Zo vroegen we bv 1 clubsandwich ipv menu met 3 gangen omdat wij dit te veel vinden 2 x per dag.Vooraf was ook nergens te vinden hoe het volpension zou worden ingevuld. Wij dachten er goed aan te doen omdat we vermoedden dat het resort afgelegen was. Er zijn echter verschillende restaurants in de buurt.
Aan het zwembad staan slechts 18 ligzetels. Voor een resort met meer dan 50 kamers absoluut Onvoldoende. Het strand is opgehoogd en verdwijnt bijgevolg op gezette tijden terug in zee. De lounge zetels stonden zo goed als op elkaar gestapeld. Alweer geen mogelijkheid tot relaxen...men had deze zetels ook op het uitgestrekte gazon kunnen plaatsen zodat de gasten er nog iets aan hadden, maar ook hier primeerde het uitzicht boven het comfort en welzijn van de gasten. 
Wij hebben 4 weken door Vietnam gereisd, voor we hier verbleven. Het was het duurste verblijf, maar ver van het beste. De kennis van het Engels van de baliemedewerkers was ook veel minder dan In vele kleinere, eenvoudiger hotels. Wij hebben de indruk vooral de naam Radisson betaald te hebben.

reviews.positives: Het personeel is uitermate vriendelijk en behulpzaam (dank je wel Tuan van de receptie, Tranh van de barbeque, Hanh van de massage en al jullie fantastische collega's). Het restaurant is prima.  Aan de klachten van andere reviewers over het systeem van vaste menu's is verholpen.  Je kan kiezen uit een uitgebreid à la carte aanbod of een barbeque-formule (aan te raden !).  Het ontbijt is zeer uitgebreid en van topkwaliteit.
reviews.negatives: Er waren twee kleine minpuntjes in onze kamer.  De badkamer had een douche die niet afgeschermd was door een kabine zodat de hele badkamer nat was na het nemen van een douche, en je dus niets kon bewaren in de badkamer (toiletzakken en handdoeken bij voorbeeld).  Vervelend was ook dat je het licht in de badkamer enkel kon aandoen als ook het licht in heel de kamer aan was.  Dit maakt dat je 's nachts enkel naar het toilet kan met de lamp van je mobiele telefoon, ten minste als je je partner niet wakker wil maken.

reviews.title: Kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời và lãng mạn
reviews.text: Chúng tôi đã có một khoảng thời gian cực kỳ đáng nhớ tại đây. Không gian rất riêng tư, thiết kể tinh tế và không khí vô cùng ẩm cúng
reviews.response:
Xin chào Johnny,

Lời chào nồng nhiệt nhất từ Radisson Resort Phan Thiết,
Cám ơn bạn rất nhiều vì đã dành thời gian viết đánh giá về kỳ nghỉ vừa qua của mình tại Radisson Resort Phan Thiết. Chúng tôi rất vui mừng khi biết rằng bạn đã có trải nghiệm tuyệt vời tại thành phố biển xinh đẹp Phan Thiết.
Chúng tôi đánh giá rất cao phản hồi tích cực của bạn. Sự hài lòng của bạn là động lực để chúng tôi cố gắng cung cấp những dịch vụ tốt hơn và chu đáo hơn. Đồng thời, chúng tôi cũng tạo ra những trải nghiệm đáng nhớ cho tất cả các vị khách khi đến với Phan Thiết. 
Chúng tôi hi vọng ban sẽ sớm quay lại thăm chúng tôi và tiếp tục tận hưởng tất cả những gì Radisson Resort Phan Thiết mang lại.
Một lần nữa xin cảm ơn quý khách đã lựa chon Radisson Resort Phan Thiết cho kì nghỉ của mình.

Trân trọng,
Simply Delightful


Mai Thanh Tuấn
Quản Lí Trải Nghiệm Khách Hàng

reviews.title: Excellent stay with very nice family room
reviews.text:
My two kids really loved the Family Room at this resort – it’s spacious, comes with a bunk bed, a small living area, and two bathrooms. The resort itself has a charming, compact layout with lots of palm trees. The staff were extremely friendly and even helped me with an early check-in at 11am without any extra charge.

The only downside, in my personal opinion, is that the breakfast buffet doesn’t have many options.
reviews.response:

Regarding your comments about breakfast, we truly appreciate your constructive feedback. Please rest assured that it has been shared with our Executive Chef for further improvement.

At Radisson Resort Phan Thiet, every moment matters, and guest experience is at the center of everything we do.

Once again, thank you for your positive review. We look forward to welcoming you back in the near future.

Kind regards,

Kien Nguyen
Rooms Division Manager

reviews.response:

Cảm ơn anh/chị đã chia sẻ cảm nhận về kỳ nghỉ tại khách sạn. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết anh/chị hài lòng với khuôn viên, sự sạch sẽ, bữa sáng cũng như sự thân thiện của nhân viên.

Tuy nhiên, trong trường hợp có phòng sẵn, chúng tôi luôn cố gắng hỗ trợ khách nhận phòng sớm nhất có thể. Rất tiếc vì lần này chưa thể đáp ứng sớm hơn mong đợi của anh/chị. Chúng tôi sẽ tiếp tục cải thiện để mang đến trải nghiệm tốt hơn trong tương lai.
Hy vọng sẽ được đón tiếp anh/chị quay lại vào lần tới!

reviews.text:
I loved this resort. It was not too big or spread out. 70 or so rooms- mine was large & comfortable, with a nice balcony looking toward the sea. the pool had an interesting design, and the beach was just a few steps away from the pool.  The sand is soft, and the hotel even has big couches along the edge of the beach. I could walk quite far out into the surf too. The water was fairly clean- what little garbage that did come in was cleaned up by the staff.                      The snack bar by the pool was great and open until 10 pm. The dining room had a fairly big menu-we ate their one time, and  the buffet breakfasts were very good.     Because the hotel is well south of Phan Thiet itself (15-20 km north) and Mui Ne (30-40 km to the north), it is that much closer to Sai Gon on the new highway-well under 3 hours drive.  And NovaWorld WaterPark and Amusement Park are walking distance from the hotel!
The trade-off is that the large selection of good local restaurants is about 1/2 hour-drive away, in Phan Thiet.
But as a place to chill and relax, this is as good as it gets, which more reasonable prices than some of the bigger hotels.

reviews.title: Affordable luxury and pet friendly
reviews.text:
We booked a villa and it was surprisingly cheap ! 
When we arrived the staff was very courteous and immediately checked us in without too much of a hassle and the check out was equally hassle-free.
I paid a small charge of around 20usd per night for my pet (2kg teacup poodle). They provided me with stainless steel dishes and a bed for my dog. 
The room was spacious, very well appointed and was cozy too. The only problem we had was with the lights (a tiny bit confusing as to how it works to turn off the lights in the room and use the lights in the toilet)
This was a tiny little problem that didn’t dampen our vacation. 
Breakfast was included in the price and it was phenomenal!! My friend wanted French toast and he had to simply show the staff a video, and the toast showed up! It was very well made too.
If you’re looking for a hotel that’s luxurious and affordable this is the place to be at. Or if you’re looking for a hotel that will allow your pets to stay with you, the radisson is the place to be!

reviews.title: Beautiful resort - new and clean
reviews.text:
A new and clean beautiful resort, spacious with well-maintained greenery, and a relatively clean private beach. The staff pick up trash by hand, and there are no vehicles for trash and sand collection, so it is not as clean as the beaches of other resorts. 
During check-in, there is a tea time from 3-4 PM. The tea and cakes are delicious, but every time the staff brings out the cakes, they only bring one tiny piece on a plate; if you want more after finishing, you have to ask and wait. After waiting, the staff brings out a different type of cake, also just one tiny piece - once you take a bite and finish, you have to ask again and wait… it feels very uncomfortable regarding this matter.
I booked a family room with bunk beds. The beds are nice and clean, the room has two TVs with sports channels, and the picture is clear, but there is no YouTube. The Wi-Fi is strong.
The heated pool is very clean. The towels are thick and soft. The shower area after the beach has very strong water pressure.
Breakfast may not have many dishes, but everything is very delicious and of high quality. The layout is clean, attractive, and easy to access.
The dining tables and chairs are very clean and comfortable; since our family went in the middle of the week, it was not crowded or cramped.
The elevator is small - it’s quick to walk up the floors, so walking is also a good option if you want to exercise more.
The family room balcony is extremely beautiful - with a cool breeze and soft cushions.
Everything is very good and wonderful - only the issue with tea time is not very comfortable - so it should be improved.
The hotel staff reported that due to peak summer season, they could not accommodate late check-out. They said there were no more rooms, but I actually noticed the hotel was very empty - just a few guests scattered around, and the app also showed that there were still many rooms available for my booking.
Radisson operates very well - but I rate Radisson Cam Ranh higher.

reviews.title: Highly recommended
reviews.text:
Excellent in all respects.  Was a short trip in Phan Thiet but we had a great time. Spacious room, new facilities. Staff were very courteous and accommodative. We arrived at 12pm and our room were ready, which was amazing. Location is a bit far from Phan Thiet city centre but it was not a hassle for us as we love how peaceful the area was. Good quality of buffet breakfast and wide choice. We would definitely comeback next time and recommend the resort to our friends and families.

Phòng mới và sạch sẽ, giường êm đầy đủ tiện nghi. Các bạn nhân viên rất thân thiện và tận tâm. Khuôn viên resort rất nhiều cây xanh và hồ nước nên không khí rất mát mẻ, trong lành. Được nhận phòng sớm lúc 12h trưa. Vị trí có hơi xa từ trung tâm thành phố Phan Thiết nhưng xung quanh cũng có  khá nhiều hàng quán và khu vui chơi nên rất thích hợp để đi nghỉ dưỡng với gia đình và bạn bè. Bữa sáng buffet có rất nhiều lựa chọn, rất hợp khẩu vị, quầy bánh đa dạng nhưng mình hy vọng lần sau quay lại sẽ có nhiều sự lựa chọn và chất lượng hơn nữa. 

Many thanks to the team for a lovely stay!

reviews.title: Wonderful vacation
reviews.text: The Radisson Hotel provides a very pleasant and friendly atmosphere. The landscape and greenery are major plus points, with well-maintained plants, no pests, and various birds chirping all day, which is very relaxing. Walking around the hotel grounds is cool and refreshing; I really enjoy hotels with lots of greenery. The family room has spacious bunk beds and rounded designs safe for young children. The balcony is wide and offers a direct view of the sea, which is very pleasing to the eye. I only found the food and beverage menu to be somewhat limited. Overall, within this price range, I highly appreciate the Radisson Resort and I will definitely return for a vacation.
reviews.response:

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: A hotel with excellent food and beverages, I ordered pizza at the pool and the pool pizza dough tasted like it was made in a wood-fired oven, making it even more delicious. The hamburger and fries were tasty, and the meat was really substantial. Overall, the food had a healthy vibe, and since the hamburger meat is low in fat and lightly seasoned, I recommend adding some salt and pepper. The breakfast was truly lovely. Although it seemed to have a few options, everything was delicious. There was always one mild meat option, which was great for feeding kids. Adults were happy with the rice noodles, which changed every day for three days. The beef rice noodles were a staple, while the pork meatballs, fish cake, and chicken rice noodles rotated. The croissants were tasty. The waffles also looked delicious, but there were so many options that I couldn't try everything. We also had a picnic. It was a bit disappointing that many of the foods at breakfast were duplicated, especially for a foodie, but anyone who enjoys taking photos would be very satisfied. There was also a "pika time," which I think was at 3 PM on Wednesdays and Fridays... The Vietnamese coffee I had at that time was the best!!!!!!!!!!! They even made coffee for us in the morning. It took about 25 minutes and around 10,000 won to get to remote places or Lotte Mart. If you avoid rush hour, it’s manageable. They were very attentive to requests for changing pillows and providing ointments for insect bites. It was a trip with children, and there was a moment when a toddler fell into the pool while playing next to it, but they rescued the child at lightning speed. Thanks to that, the child enjoyed playing in the water at the next hotel as well. Thank you, Poan!! It is a very satisfying hotel for enjoying food and drinks with children while relaxing. Also, the landscaping all the way to the beach is truly beautiful.
reviews.response:
Dear JUNGSOON,
Xin chào !

Warmest greetings from Radisson Resort Phan Thiet!
Thank you for taking the time to share your positive experience with us. It is always a pleasure to receive such wonderful feedback, and we are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay at our property.
Your feedback motivates us to continuously improve and deliver exceptional service to all our guests and we appreciate your understanding that you were unable to take a bath at the beach when you were here.
Your acknowledgment of Poan warm our hearts, and we’ll be sure to pass on your kind words.
Thank you for your kind words and recommendation. We look forward to welcoming you back for another memorable experience at your home away from home.

Best regards,
Simply Delightful


Tuan Mai
Guest Experience Manager

Each meal at the resort's restaurant left a good impression not only because of the quality of the food but also due to the attentive service attitude. Even though the restaurant was busy, they still maintained professionalism and warmth.

reviews.title: Fantastic vacation!
reviews.text:
I stayed in a spacious villa room with a large and comfortable bed. The sofa was also very big and relaxing, and there was a sunbed facing the garden in the afternoon that wasn't too hot. 

The bathroom was designed with a separate toilet, which was convenient, and there were two mirrors and two washbasins, so everyone could check themselves without a problem. The only thing is that it would be better to have a basket for dirty items; I had to hang them on the chair, which looked a bit messy.

The service was top-notch, the staff were very nice and enthusiastic, and in the afternoon, they even brought some snacks for me to munch on at night, which are little things that make guests happy!

Especially the food was delicious, but the flavors might be a bit sweet, typical of Phan Thiet cuisine. Those from the south will find it tasty, while people from other regions might not be used to it. The seafood buffet on Friday night is definitely a great deal!!!! Each person is 650k and with membership registration, there’s a 10% discount. There’s a variety of fresh seafood, just grilling them makes them tasty. The important thing is that the hotel is clean and airy. The other day, I tried to go to Phan Thiet city to eat, but it wasn't as clean, and the prices are about the same. So if it were me, I would choose to eat at the hotel to save the trip! I think the staff should be enthusiastic in recommending this buffet package to guests because many do not know about it, which is why it was a bit quiet when I dined there. Breakfast also had plenty of choices and was to my taste, with flavorful dishes (of course, a bit sweet), as usually, at other resorts, the dishes tend to be bland and unappetizing.

In summary, the quality exceeded expectations, and I will definitely return!
